bracu_official.title: BRAC University and Sporsho Braille Foundation visit Baptist Mission Integrated School
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University collaborated with Sporsho Braille Foundation to visit Baptist Mission Integrated School, fostering community engagement and support.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch his home team’s World Cup quarter-final match
bracu_official.summary: The Argentine ambassador joined BRAC University students to collectively watch Argentina's World Cup quarter-final match, highlighting cultural exchange and community spirit.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University Response Team leads blood donation and Thalassemia awareness campaign
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University Response Team successfully organized a blood donation drive along with an awareness campaign focused on Thalassemia.
